eprint.title: Design and implementation of HElib: a homomorphic encryption library
eprint.abstract: HElib is a C++ open source library (see https://github.com/homenc/HElib) that implements both the BGV and CKKS  fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) schemes. This document summarizes some of the basic design principles of HElib, and describes some of its fundamental algorithms and data structures in signiﬁcant detail. It is a work in progress, and currently focuses exclusively on the BGV scheme.
